text:
:For the version in Pocket Mortys, see Specs Morty.

Glasses Morty (aka Specs) is a version of Morty who wears glasses. He made his first official appearance as a supporting character in a quartet of other Mortys in the Season 3 episode, "The Ricklantis Mixup". He attends the Morty Academy, and is close friends with Left-Handed Morty, Lizard Morty, and formerly Slick Morty, before the latter supposedly committed suicide.

Like the other Morty's, Glasses Morty is good-natured, kindhearted, and abnormally hormonal. He is also slightly more emotionally intelligent and understanding than other Mortys.
